title: potentilla thuringiaca subsp. goldbachii
intro: Potentilla thuringiaca subsp. goldbachii, also known as Goldbach's cinquefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Potentilla thuringiaca subsp. goldbachii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
